description_long: This skyscraper features a striking twisted architectural form, with each floor slightly rotated relative to the one below, creating a dynamic spiral effect up the entire height of the structure. The facade is composed of alternating horizontal bands of blue-tinted glass and dark structural elements, giving the building a modern and visually engaging appearance. The base is a simple, solid rectangular platform, providing stability and contrast to the twisting upper section. The top of the building is flat, with a recessed area that may house mechanical equipment or a rooftop terrace, bordered by a blue parapet. The windows are arranged in continuous horizontal bands, emphasizing the building's height and the twisting motion. The overall design is sleek and futuristic, making it a prominent landmark in any urban skyline.
description: A tall, twisted skyscraper with blue-tinted glass bands and a dynamic spiral facade, set on a solid rectangular base. The design is modern and visually striking, with continuous horizontal window bands.
description_view_0: The skyscraper's twisted facade is prominent, with blue glass bands and dark structural lines spiraling upward from a solid base.
description_view_1: This view shows the opposite side, maintaining the spiral effect and horizontal window bands, with subtle differences in the shadowing and twist angle.
description_view_2: The spiral twist is again visible, with the blue glass and dark bands creating a dynamic visual rhythm along the facade.
description_view_3: The final view highlights the consistent twisting design and horizontal banding, with the top and base clearly visible.
attribute_facade_design: The facade features alternating horizontal bands of blue-tinted glass and dark structural elements, with a pronounced spiral twist running up the building. The surface is sleek and reflective, emphasizing the dynamic geometry.
